description: Triggers for system design, architecture review, and technical decision-making

queries.query: Design the system architecture for a real-time messaging platform
Review our proposed microservices architecture and identify issues
Should we move from monolith to microservices? Review the trade-offs
Create C4 architecture diagrams for our e-commerce platform
Write an Architecture Decision Record for switching to PostgreSQL
Design a scalable system for 1M concurrent users with 99.9% uptime
Review this technical design and identify scalability risks
Help me design the data model and service boundaries for our platform
What technology choices should we make for our event-driven system?
Architecture review: is our current approach going to scale to 10x traffic?
Fix the bug in my API endpoint code
Set up a CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions
Write unit tests for my Python service
Create a product roadmap for our SaaS application
Help me negotiate a senior architect job offer
Optimize this SQL query for better performance
Build a Kubernetes deployment manifest for my service
Create a resume for a solutions architect role
Research market trends in cloud infrastructure
Set up monitoring and alerting for my production service
